title: Birth, Yuuki, Awakening
overview: Yuuki Wakura wanders through a gate to an alternate dimension. He meets the Demon Defense Force including Chief Kyouka Uzen, who will reward him for his servitude.

title: Curiosity, Shushu, Undress
overview: Yuuki is recruited to work as a caretaker at the 7th Squadron’s dorm in Mato. Shushu catches him unaware and turns him into her boy toy. Suddenly, a giant Shuuki attacks!

title: Encounter, Kyouka,  Rampage
overview: With dozens of Shuuki detected, and a score to settle, Yuuki and the Demon Defense Force Squadron take an interdimensional trip!

title: Whirlwind, Himari, Roar
overview: The Demon Defense Force decides to take measures against the humanoid Shuuki. Meanwhile, Himari can adopt someone else’s ability, which she does to turn Yuuki “loyal” to her.

title: Sisters, Yachiho, Ridicule
overview: Yuuki hits Yachiho with a “Brand Break,” so she rewinds to before the beginning of the match. Later, Himari appreciates Yuuki; it’s time for his reward to begin!

title: Blitz, Sahara, Twinkle
overview: Up next in Round 2: It's Shushu Suruga of the 7th Squadron versus Sahara Wakasa of the 6th Squadron! And after the match, Shushu has a surprise for Yuuki.

title: United Front, Tenka, Soar
overview: Tenka confronts Rairen, then uses her ability to manipulate space. Later, Yuuuki tidies up and gets a face full of more than dirty laundry!

title: Promise, Nei, Remember
overview: Tenka wants Yuuki as her new pet, but Kyouka declines her request. Nei explains her clairvoyant powers, the “promise.”

title: Reunion, Coco, Lick
overview: A demon who looks like Yuuki’s sister appears and abducts him! Then after the dust settles, an enemy licks Yuuki down for... medical reasons.

title: War, Naon, Recite
overview: Yuuki learns a less than peachy truth. Later, he receives a finger licking good reward.

title: Death Match, Aoba, Excite
overview: With Yuuki tied up and unable to fight, it’s up to the girls to harness the power of the peaches in a non-stop battle. Suddenly, those who control the demons appear...

title: Homecoming, New, Resolve
overview: Yuuki finds a new reason to fight: to return Aoba to her original human form.

title: Commanders' Meeting
overview: The 7th Squad may have settled into a new normal, but trouble soon follows when the commanders hold a meeting.

title: Ren's Shadow
overview: Ren grows increasingly interested in Yukki, especially once one of the Eight Thunder Gods appears in his room.

title: A Storm Rolls In
overview: Yakumo wants nothing more than a harem full of women. But when she sets her sights on Yuuki, she just might decide to add him, too.

title: Rampage
overview: When Ren orders Kyouka to lend her Yuuki, the Supreme Commander unlocks a form befitting her power. However, even her might isn't enough to deny Yuuki a reward.

title: The Azuma Banquet
overview: A contest will decide the next head of the Azuma Family.

title: A New Azuma
overview: Fubuki challenges Himari to a duel.

title: Late Summer Slave
overview: Kyouka notices how many women are growing closer to Yuuki.

title: The Commander of the 2nd Squadron
overview: When a Thunder God begins abducting women, the Demon Defense Force sends Mira and Kyouka to confront her.

title: A Commander's Resolve
overview: Mira is a formidable fighter, but her opponent is a Thunder God. If she wants to win, she'll have to pull out all the stops.

title: Yokohama Showdown
overview: Kuusetsu's new power makes her more dangerous than ever.

title: Slave: Heaven
overview: Yuuki and Kyouka have come a long way, and they've forged a bond strong enough to stand against a god. But even if they win this battle, the war is far from over.

title: Gods Assemble
overview: In the aftermath, both the Demon Defense Force and the Thunder Gods prepare for what comes next.
